issues_found: Source URL is empty - no valid source attribution provided
Source is explicitly a placeholder with no actual repo operation data
Source contains only boilerplate text: 'This is still a placeholder dataset snapshot for NY Fed Repo Operations from nyfed. Next we can replace this with real dataset/API fetches.'
No transaction amounts, counterparties, dates, or any substantive data present
Source has zero archival value - it is explicitly marked for replacement with real data

human_review_reason: The generated record is well-constructed and accurately describes the placeholder nature of the source. However, the source itself is fundamentally non-archivable: it is explicitly a placeholder stub with no actual data, no valid URL, and no market structure or macro catalyst content. This is a clear reject based on source quality, not record quality.
